channel.title: Posts on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on JooYoung Seo: a Learning Scientist for Inclusive Learning Ecologies

item.title: Initial Post
item.description: Three Available Packages Specialized for Visually Impaired R Users There are three packages for the blind R users (Godfrey, Warren, Murrell, Bilton, & Sorge, 2018; Seo, 2017; Siegert & Williams, 2017). Methods Creswell (2014) suggests a mixed methods study as a balanced methodology between qualitative and quantitative research. Basic Histogram See Figure 1 made by base R: Figure 1: Histogram of Ozone. VI(hist(airquality$Ozone)) ## This is a histogram, with the title: Histogram of airquality$Ozone ## "airquality$Ozone" is marked on the x-axis.
